# devin_org_idp_group_role (Resource)

Maps a registered IdP group to a role scoped to a single organization. Members of the IdP group inherit the assigned role within that organization. Use devin_enterprise_idp_group_role for enterprise-wide roles.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up role IDs instead of hard-coding them.
data "devin_roles" "all" {}

locals {
  org_member_role_id = one([
    for r in data.devin_roles.all.roles : r.role_id
    if r.role_type == "org" && r.role_name == "Member"
  ])
}

# Grant an org-scoped role to everyone in the IdP group.
resource "devin_org_idp_group_role" "engineering_backend" {
  org_id         = devin_organization.backend.org_id
  idp_group_name = devin_idp_group.engineering.name
  role_id        = local.org_member_role_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `idp_group_name` (String) Name of a registered IdP group (see devin_idp_group).
- `org_id` (String) Organization ID the role assignment is scoped to.
- `role_id` (String) Role to assign. Must be an org-level role.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Org IdP group roles are imported with the org ID and the IdP group name.
terraform import devin_org_idp_group_role.engineering_backend org-10febda2abdb4439b822e6b1c9f721f2/engineering
```
